sections.label: Verse 1
lines: A siangtho tui luanna mualkum zui dingin,
Jesuh in lam hong pi leh lungdam zui ning;
A
khut zanin, tuipi hual tung hong sawl zong,
A mangte gup nading A thu va puak
ning.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Lam hong hilh bang zui ning,
Lungdam takin zui ning;
Gumpa hong hilh
bangin zui ning,
Lungdam tak zui ning.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Bangmah omlo, mual sang tung ahi
zongin,
A lawmte tawh kikhen a, mangthang tuuno;
Huih le guahpi a zu zongin va zong
ning,
Gumpa hong lah bang mailam nawt va pai ning.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Ka zui ding hi, Gumpa hong lah mah
bangin,
Dah ta leng, nuam ta leng, lungdamin zui ning;
Gumpa’n thei hi, a muanhuai thuman
lampi,
A tang kham khuapi sungah hong tunpih ding.
